machine.description: Reverb Transcription via Rev async REST API with diarization enabled by default
machine.pricingNotes: Rev AI speech-to-text estimates use published per-hour pricing for the selected Reverb model and apply the registry billing minimum and per-second rounding. Discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: The 5 TB limit applies to dashboard or source_config submissions; current CLI uploads multipart media files directly.

low_cost.description: Reverb Turbo transcription via Rev async REST API with diarization enabled by default
low_cost.pricingNotes: Rev AI speech-to-text estimates use published per-hour pricing for the selected Reverb model and apply the registry billing minimum and per-second rounding. Discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: The 5 TB limit applies to dashboard or source_config submissions; current CLI uploads multipart media files directly.
